ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Reset To Oct-16-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Bob Balian.
Connie Chan, Esq. for Petitioner: Janet Su Mei Lin Su, not present.
At counsel's request, matter is continued to Oct. 16, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for an appearance of the Petitioner.
